seoTitle: Ashby vs Ashfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ashby and Ashfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ashby and Ashfield.
heading: Ashby vs Ashfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ashby, Western Australia and Ashfield, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ashby has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Ashfield (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ashby or Ashfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ashby has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Ashfield scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ashby scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Ashfield scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ashby or Ashfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ashby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
